description: No manual cleanup() in Vitest — automatic. Keep only vi.restoreAllMocks()

trap: mockDb declared before vi.mock but used in factory scope
description: Use vi.hoisted() for variables inside vi.mock() factory

trap: test2 depends on sharedUser from test1
description: No test-to-test dependencies; explicit setup per test

trap: test1, test2, test3 as test names
description: Descriptive names with scenario + expected outcome
Assert specific values, not snapshots (maintenance trap)
Mock at boundaries only (network, DB), never internal collaborators
Factory functions for test data, not fixtures
Zero sleep: wait for network/UI state, never waitForTimeout
User-centric selectors: getByRole, getByLabel, not CSS classes

trap: Real Stripe API call in test
description: Mock third-party services with page.route() interception

trap: Same selectors/actions duplicated inline across both e2e tests
description: Extract repeated selectors/actions into a shared abstraction (named locator helpers or a Page Object) instead of inlining them in every test — single-file helper functions count

trap: cancel order test depends on checkout test state
description: Independent tests with fresh context, no shared state

trap: page.$() + toBeNull() instead of web-first expect
test4 accesses private internals (_cache, _retryCount) via (service as any)
description: Test behavior not implementation — never access private internals

trap: test5 asserts typeof checks that TypeScript already guarantees
description: Don't test what types guarantee (typeof checks on typed values)

trap: Playwright config has trace/video/screenshot set to 'on' (always) instead of retain-on-failure
